summary: Metadata issue flagged; reviewers provide no insight into audio or performance quality.
review: Both reviews point out that the setlist metadata was incorrect (show listed as 9/11/83) and note that it has been corrected, but they give no commentary on the musical performance or recording fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews focused solely on a setlist error; there is insufficient information to assess show or recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type; reviewers only discussed metadata.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers noted the setlist information was wrong (listed as 9/11/83) but confirmed the music itself is correct.
